pickATier: Pick a tier — preview updates as you select.
previewUnavailableBody: Your campaign content is ready, but the new preview surface requires the latest backend release. Sign in to view your campaign in the meantime.
sessionExpiredBody: Your preview session has expired. Please re-submit your URL to start over.
notFoundBody: We couldn't find this campaign preview. Try submitting your URL again.
premiumDescription: Everything in Growth + Display ads + Social video
checkoutUnavailableBody: Stripe did not return a checkout URL.
paymentsUnavailableBody: Payments are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
alternativesDialogSubtitle: These ideas also came up during discovery — pick a different direction for your campaign.
regenSubtitle: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll generate a fresh set of ideas.
regenFeedbackLabel: What kind of story are you looking for?
regenFeedbackPlaceholder: e.g. focus on the youth literacy program, or a more local angle…
regenMaxReachedDesc: You've used all your regeneration attempts. Pick one of the ideas above to continue.
regenApprovedDesc: Regenerating ideas isn't available once a campaign is approved. Pick one of the ideas above, or start a new discovery to explore fresh ideas.
alternativesEmpty: No alternate ideas available for this campaign yet.
storyAlreadyGeneratedDescription: Please check your campaigns — we've already built one for you.
